name: Kojic Acid
description: A byproduct of fermented rice wine (sake) and soy sauce production, potent for brightening.
scientificSummary: Chelates copper, inhibiting tyrosinase and halting production of visible pigment.
mechanismOfAction: Chelates copper, inhibiting tyrosinase and halting production of visible pigment.

seo.title: Kojic Acid - Clinical Profile & Compatibility | Dew Theory
seo.description: Discover the scientific benefits, compatibility, and clinical profile of Kojic Acid in skincare.
